_comment: Functions promoted from the direct-call oracle rung (CONF_LIVE) to the live SHADOW DISPATCHER rung (path to CONF_BATTLETESTED). See conformance/D2COMMON_FULL_SHADOW_PLAN.md. Generated into D2.Detours.patches/1.13c/D2Common_ShadowDispatch.gen.h by conformance/tools/gen_shadow_dispatch.py. offset = D2Common+off (VERIFIED, corrected_maps -- never the scrambled .def ordinal). reimpl is bound from the provider DLL BY NAME automatically. class A = return-value integer (<=32-bit), comparison = masked return value, reimpl pure or read-only-through-pointer.

entries.name: GetSeedHi
entries.note: uint __fastcall(pSeed) -> high dword; read-only

entries.name: GetItemRandSeed
entries.note: uint __fastcall(pSeed) -> low dword; read-only

entries.name: GetDataTableRowEntryCount
entries.note: int __stdcall(row) -> count; reads live g_dwDataTableBase

entries.name: DUNGEON_GetTownLevelIdFromActNo
entries.note: int __stdcall(act) -> town level id; act 0..4 only

entries.name: UNIT_GetMode
entries.note: byte __stdcall(UnitAny*) -> mode @+0x90; read-only (often inlined, thin shadow volume)

entries.name: InitRngSeed
entries.note: void __fastcall(pState, seed); state OUT = seed | (0x29a<<32). Reimpl runs on a copy -> game buffer only gets original's write.

entries.name: SetCoordPair
entries.note: void __fastcall(pCoord, x, y); coord OUT = x | (y<<32).

entries.name: InitTimerState
entries.note: void __fastcall(pState); state OUT = 1 | (0x29a<<32). NEW leaf reimplemented 2026-07-07 from disasm; safe to shadow live (SEH-guarded thunk logs a fault if wrong).

entries.name: DATATBLS_GetSkillsTxtRecord
entries.note: Class D register-explicit (arg in EAX, ptr ret). void* orig(int nSkillId in EAX) -> g_pDataTables record. Reimpl is __fastcall(int). First register-explicit shadow dispatcher; live-proven 14/14 via the oracle before promotion.

entries.name: DATATBLS_GetMissileParamTxtRecord
entries.note: Class D (EAX-input, ptr ret). fun-doc auto-proven live 12/12; g_pDataTables record accessor.

entries.name: DATATBLS_GetItemTypeTxtRecord
entries.note: Class D (EAX-input, ptr ret). fun-doc auto-proven live 15/15; g_pDataTables record accessor.

entries.name: DATATBLS_GetItemStatCostTxtRecord
entries.note: Class D (EAX-input, ptr ret). fun-doc auto-proven live 13/13; g_pDataTables record accessor.

entries.name: GetUnitField91
entries.note: CONF_LIVE unit/struct getter; class A (ret u8). Hand-proven; staged for shadow promotion.

entries.name: GetByte0x94
entries.note: CONF_LIVE unit/struct getter; class A (ret u8). Hand-proven; staged for shadow promotion.
